mapper.select: SELECT competency_id AS competencyId, fit_type AS fitType, group_code AS groupCode, level_code AS levelCode, name, my_score AS myScore, required_score AS requiredScore, status, icon, comment, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM sys_report_competency WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY sort_order, competency_id

SELECT s.competency_id AS competencyId, s.source_type AS sourceType, s.detail, s.is_primary AS isPrimary FROM sys_report_competency_source s JOIN sys_report_competency c ON c.competency_id = s.competency_id WHERE c.report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY s.is_primary DESC, s.source_id

SELECT cfi_score AS cfiScore, cfi_delta AS cfiDelta, summary_title AS summaryTitle, summary_text AS summaryText, keyword_badges AS keywordBadges, criteria_summary AS criteriaSummary, market_summary AS marketSummary FROM sys_report_activity WHERE report_id = #{reportId}

SELECT company, role, meta, fit_rate AS fitRate, match_count AS matchCount, recommendation, gap_keywords AS gapKeywords, strengths, advices FROM sys_report_jd_match WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY match_id
